name: One-Pan Potatoes and Chicken Rosemary
recipeIngredient: 1 1/3 lb (4 medium) potatoes - cut into 1/4-inch slices
1 lb chicken breasts - boned and skinned, then cut into 1/2-inch strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the sliced potatoes in a shallow 1 1/2- to 2-quart microwave-safe dish.
2. Cover with plastic wrap, leaving one corner vented. Microwave on HIGH for 8 to 10 minutes until tender.
3. In a large nonstick skillet over high heat, brown the chicken and garlic in oil for 5 minutes.
4. Add the potatoes and rosemary; toss until the potatoes are lightly browned.
5. Season with salt and pepper.
Menu: Steamed Broccoli or Asparagus, Brownies and Ice Cream
Nutritional Information Per Serving: 260 calories; 9 g fat; 45 mg cholesterol; 50 mg sodium; 26 g carbohydrate; 2 g fiber; 20 g protein.
